message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing true
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #000000
  BoxBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
}

participant "./zbox start-repair" as zbox
participant "gosdk" as gosdk

zbox -> gosdk : StartRepair(localRootPath, repairPath, statusBar)

gosdk -> gosdk : check initialized allocation
gosdk -> gosdk : get list result with repair path
gosdk -> gosdk : create repair request
gosdk -> gosdk : process repair
gosdk -> gosdk : check for cancel repair
gosdk -> gosdk : iteratively get directory and files separately till no more directories left

alt [not empty statusCB]
  gosdk -> zbox : repair completed and return
end

@enduml
```
